name: Chris Van Hollen
subject: our biggest job
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
I wanted to send you a quick note after the Senate debate I had today, and before voters head to the polls for early voting -- which starts tomorrow. |
[](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91a90/70cdc2ba/4737e634/397b428/3192999690/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh-keep-fighting?refcode=em092816_2&amount=25.00&recurring=12&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=em1026116_2&source=em1026116_2") Friend, I wanted to send you a quick note after the Senate debate I had today, and before voters head to the polls for early voting -- which starts tomorrow.

Today's debate once again highlighted the very different visions for the future between my pro-Trump opponent and myself. The elections for President, the Senate and the House will determine the future direction of our state and country and no one should sit this one out or think that their vote doesn't count. The stakes are simply too high. Yet, polls show that in the Maryland Senate race 15% of voters remain undecided.

In the final days of this campaign our biggest job is to make sure that Marylanders focus on the issues and get out to cast their ballots in the days ahead to move our state and our country forward.

I'm counting on you. **[Please commit to vote.](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91a90/70cdc2ba/4737e634/397b429/3192999690/VEsE/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/stand-with-chris-early-voting?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2+-+Please+commit+to+vote&utm_campaign=em1026116_2&source=em1026116_2")** [Commit to Vote](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91a90/70cdc2ba/4737e634/397b426/3192999690/VEsF/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/stand-with-chris-early-voting?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=3+-+Commit+to+Vote&utm_campaign=em1026116_2&source=em1026116_2") Onwards!

Chris
[ Chip in Now](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91a90/70cdc2ba/4737e634/397b427/3192999690/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh-keep-fighting?refcode=em102516_1&amount=25.00&recurring=12&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=4+-+FIRSTNAME+Chip+in+Now&utm_campaign=em1026116_2&source=em1026116_2")
---

name: Patrick Murphy
subject: proud
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida
body:
| |
---
| | [](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2e7f/738133e4/3262ea25/7f8591c0/3017499909/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme161026pm3?refcode=pme161026pm3_m&recurring=true&amount=10")

| Hey, Team! I just finished the second debate with Marco Rubio and I wanted to reach out to you.

Marco Rubio continues to put his own political ambition first and stand by Donald Trump. It's never been more clear that Florida deserves better.

I'm proud of how it went tonight. I'd be even more proud to show up and work hard to represent Florida in the U.S. Senate. [**If you 're with me in the final stretch, can you contribute before midnight?**](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2e7f/738133e4/3262ea25/7f8591c0/3017499909/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme161026pm3?refcode=pme161026pm3_m&recurring=true&amount=10")

Your support means so much to me.

Thank you,
Patrick

name: Lenee Kruse, RussFeingold.com
subject: Cash on hand
disclaimer_text: paid for by Russ for Wisconsin, Joe Sensenbrenner, Madison, WI, Treasurer
body:
Senator Johnson is beating us in the cash on hand. We need to catch up. | [](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4657/1c469400/1f871e6/354228f/357355688/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/oct-eom?utm_source=ema_2016-10-26_oct_eom2_nd&refcode=ema_2016-10-26_oct_eom2_nd&utm_campaign=oct_eom2&utm_medium=ema") Friend -- Senator Ron Johnson's campaign has more cash on hand than ours. $600,000 more than us, to be exact. This doesn't even _begin_ to cover the millions of dollars that right-wing groups have poured into Wisconsin to support Senator Johnson's campaign (at a rate of $1 million per week!) **Friend, if we want to keep pace, we have to catch up. And there's no time to lose.** **[Help Russ close the cash-on-hand gap. Contribute $5 today to help us raise $600,000 by midnight on October 31.](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4657/1c469400/1f871e6/354228f/357355688/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/oct-eom?utm_source=ema_2016-10-26_oct_eom2_nd&refcode=ema_2016-10-26_oct_eom2_nd&utm_campaign=oct_eom2&utm_medium=ema")** [](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4657/1c469400/1f871e6/354228f/357355688/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/oct-eom?utm_source=ema_2016-10-26_oct_eom2_nd&refcode=ema_2016-10-26_oct_eom2_nd&utm_campaign=oct_eom2&utm_medium=ema") [](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4657/1c469400/1f871e6/354228f/357355688/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/oct-eom?utm_source=ema_2016-10-26_oct_eom2_nd&refcode=ema_2016-10-26_oct_eom2_nd&utm_campaign=oct_eom2&utm_medium=ema") _Or, if your payment information is saved with ActBlue, click below and your contribution will go through immediately:_ | | [$5 »](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4657/1c469400/1f871e6/354228c/357355688/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/oct-eom?utm_source=ema_2016-10-26_oct_eom2_nd&refcode=ema_2016-10-26_oct_eom2_nd&utm_campaign=oct_eom2&utm_medium=ema&express_lane=true&amount=5")

Every dollar we raise toward our goal will be put to immediate use in our aggressive final get-out-the-vote push. It gives us the resources to do more field, more mail, and more ads.

Finance Director

name: Deborah Ross
subject: Republican S.O.S. call
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Deborah Ross for Senate Deborah Ross for Senate
body:
| |
---
| |
---
| Republicans are in the midst of a rescue mission. **I 'm calling it "Save The Special Interest Senate."**

**The National Republican Senatorial Committee (NRSC) just dropped $2 million in ads for Senator Burr in North Carolina because it 's such a close race.**

They know if we win, it's game over. It will be nearly impossible for Republicans to preserve their Senate majority without Senator Burr's seat.

[_**We 're on track to make that happen, but we can't lose momentum. We need to fend off slimy GOP attack ads. Make sure we flip this seat and reclaim the Senate for Democrats. Give $5.**_](https://secure.deborahross.com/page/m/45f427a0/2cc31c44/558a5bd/19f9bba2/3615696646/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dre161026pm2?refcode=dre161026pm2_m&recur_weekly=true&amount=5")

This $2 million is just the beginning of the right-wing's last-ditch attempt to save Senator Burr's campaign.

When a major party makes an investment in a race, it's a signal to outside groups to follow. **Republicans just sent up a flare to the Kochs, Karl Rove, and wealthy special interests groups. They are telling them that Burr needs their cash.**

[_**I need your help to make sure we aren 't drowned out. We are fighting for the future of North Carolina and control of the Senate. Please donate $5 if possible.**_](https://secure.deborahross.com/page/m/45f427a0/2cc31c44/558a5bd/19f9bba2/3615696646/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dre161026pm2?refcode=dre161026pm2_m&recur_weekly=true&amount=5")

Thank you,

Deborah |
Paid for by Deborah Ross for Senate Deborah Ross for Senate
P.O. Box 28258
Raleigh NC 27611 United States This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
[Click here](https://secure.deborahross.com/page/m/45f427a0/2cc31c44/558a5bd/19f9bba1/3615696646/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://www.deborahross.com/subscriptions/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") to unsubscribe

name: DEVELOPING (via DSCC)
subject: [URGENT] McConnell's plan is WORKING
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
Mitch McConnell's plan to steal this election with dark money is working perfectly. If Democrats want to stop it -- and win across the map -- we've got to fight back TODAY. [****](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab?refcode=DPE-20161026-DevelopingDS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")
---
_*****JUST IN: MCCONNELL 'S PLAN IS WORKING PERFECTLY*****_
[ **This couldn 't be more serious, Friend! Fight back before tomorrow morning >>**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab?refcode=DPE-20161026-DevelopingDS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")
Friend, McConnell's 3-step plan is working - **and it 's saving extremists across the map:**

1. Call in the right-wing cash cavalry -- with his favorite Super PAC **dumping $25 million** into six toss-up races!

2. Pour every last penny into smearing Democrats and **buying this election** - going all-in on vicious ads to trick swing state voters.

3. Watch all that dark money ERODE Democrats' momentum... _at the worst possible time!_

His shameful last-second plan is **WRECKING our chances** of taking back the Senate. If we don't respond AGGRESSIVELY, **McConnell 's cronies will win every state we've worked to flip.**

**Friend, we 've got to wire emergency funds to our candidates immediately - but our resources are drying up fast. Can you rush a gift before tomorrow morning's deadline?**

**[Pitch in $1 IMMEDIATELY>>](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab?refcode=DPE-20161026-DevelopingDS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=1")

[Pitch in $35 IMMEDIATELY >>](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab?refcode=DPE-20161026-DevelopingDS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=35")

[Or donate another amount.](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab?refcode=DPE-20161026-DevelopingDS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")**

This is a do-or-die moment, Friend. If you want Democrats on top instead of McConnell's bought-and-paid-for majority, you can't wait another second.

So before the wire goes out, [**pitch in tonight so our candidates can SURGE past dark money and take back the Senate!**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab?refcode=DPE-20161026-DevelopingDS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

subject: help

body:
| | |
---
[View this email in your browser](http://us13.campaign-archive2.com/?u=a508ffc703e6fc82360a383e8&id=2b8dfdf5d8&e=32f1a3df98)
---
| |
---
| | Do you want to help Bill Bryant become our next governor? Here is the best way you can help in these closing days before the election: Send an email to your friends.

**_The most effective way to persuade a voter is an email from a friend._**

Here are some sample emails on different subjects that you can send to friends. Just click on the headline of the subject you want and it will automatically create an email for you.

[**Education**](mailto:?subject=Bill%20Bryant%20on%20Education&body=Making%20sure%20kids%20get%20a%20quality%20education%20is%20a%20top%20priority%20for%20me%20when%20I’m%20deciding%20who%20to%20elect%20as%20our%20next%20governor,%20and%20I%20want%20to%20let%20you%20know,%20this%20year%20I’ve%20decided%20to%20vote%20for%20Bill%20Bryant.%20Through%207th%20grade%20Bill%20attended%20a%20rural%20school%20on%20the%20Skokomish%20reservation.%20As%20a%20result,%20he%20wants%20to%20ensure%20every%20kid,%20regardless%20of%20where%20they%20go%20to%20school,%20gets%20an%20education%20that%20gives%20them%20an%20equal%20chance%20to%20get%20ahead.%20Bill%20Bryant%20is%20already%20working%20with%20legislators%20on%20a%20plan%20that%20will%20fund%20education%20equally.%20I%20hope%20you%20will%20consider%20voting%20for%20Bill%20Bryant%20for%20governor.)
Making sure kids get a quality education is a top priority for me when I’m deciding who to elect as our next governor, and I want to let you know, this year I’ve decided to vote for Bill Bryant. Through 7th grade Bill attended a rural school on the Skokomish reservation. As a result, he wants to ensure every kid, regardless of where they go to school, gets an education that gives them an equal chance to get ahead. Bill Bryant is already working with legislators on a plan that will fund education equally. I hope you will consider voting for Bill Bryant for governor.

[**Education**](mailto:?subject=Bill%20Bryant%20on%20Education&body= Making%20sure%20kids%20get%20a%20quality%20education%20is%20a%20top%20priority%20for%20me%20when%20I’m%20deciding%20who%20to%20elect%20as%20our%20next%20governor,%20and%20I%20want%20to%20let%20you%20know,%20this%20year%20I’ve%20decided%20to%20vote%20for%20Bill%20Bryant.%20Bill%20is%20dedicated%20to%20funding%20education%20for%20all%20kids,%20regardless%20of%20what%20school%20district%20they%20attend,%20but%20he%20also%20wants%20to%20make%20sure%20we%20are%20spending%20money%20in%20ways%20that%20help%20kids%20learn.%20Currently%2020-25%%20of%20ninth%20graders%20will%20not%20graduate%20from%20high%20school.%20%20Bill%20wants%20to%20reinvent%20the%20last%20two%20years%20of%20high%20school%20so%20that%20kids%20not%20wanting%20to%20go%20to%20college%20can%20enter%20pre-apprenticeship%20or%20industry%20certification%20programs%20in%20their%20junior%20and%20senior%20year.%20If%20you%20are%20interested%20in%20learning%20more%20about%20Bill’s%20ideas,%20here%20are%20some%20clips%20from%20a%20speech.%20www.billbryantforgovernor.com/cte)
Making sure kids get a quality education is a top priority for me when I’m deciding who to elect as our next governor, and I want to let you know, this year I’ve decided to vote for Bill Bryant. Bill is dedicated to funding education for all kids, regardless of what school district they attend, but he also wants to make sure we are spending money in ways that help kids learn. Currently 20-25% of ninth graders will not graduate from high school. Bill wants to reinvent the last two years of high school so that kids not wanting to go to college can enter pre-apprenticeship or industry certification programs in their junior and senior year.

If you are interested in learning more about Bill’s ideas, here are some [_clips from a speech_](http://billbryantforgovernor.us13.list-manage2.com/track/click?u=a508ffc703e6fc82360a383e8&id=8f5696e9eb&e=32f1a3df98)

[**Transportation**](mailto:?subject=Bill%20Bryant%20on%20Transportation&body=I%20am%20fed%20up%20with%20traffic%20jams%20and%20that%20is%20why%20I’ve%20decided%20to%20vote%20for%20Bill%20Bryant%20for%20governor.%20Bill%20is%20committed%20to%20refocusing%20the%20Department%20of%20Transportation%20on%20reducing%20traffic%20congestion%20so%20we%20can%20get%20to%20work%20on%20time%20and%20home%20at%20a%20reasonable%20hour.%20%0A%0ABill%20wants%20to%20return%20one%20of%20the%20405%20HOT%20lanes%20to%20general%20purpose.%20%0A%0AI%20am%20voting%20for%20Bill%20Bryant%20for%20governor%20and%20hope%20that%20you%20will%20too.%20%0A%0AHere%20is%20a%20summary%20of%20a%20speech%20Bill%20recently%20gave%20on%20traffic%20and%20transportation.%20www.billbryantforgovernor.com/fixingtraffic)
I am fed up with traffic jams and that is why I’ve decided to vote for Bill Bryant for governor. Bill is committed to refocusing the Department of Transportation on reducing traffic congestion so we can get to work on time and home at a reasonable hour.

Bill wants to return one of the 405 HOT lanes to general purpose.

I am voting for Bill Bryant for governor and hope that you will too.

Here is a [_summary of a speech_](http://billbryantforgovernor.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a508ffc703e6fc82360a383e8&id=f5a4f16a75&e=32f1a3df98) Bill recently gave on traffic and transportation.

[**Jobs**](mailto:?subject=Bill%20Bryant%20on%20Creating%20Jobs&body=I%20want%20you%20to%20know%20that%20I%20will%20be%20voting%20for%20Bill%20Bryant%20for%20governor%20and%20hope%20you%20will%20too.%20Bill%20is%20focused%20on%20generating%20jobs%20in%20communities%20all%20across%20Washington%20State.%20He%20has%20built%20an%20agricultural%20trade%20company%20that%20operates%20on%20both%20sides%20of%20the%20mountains.%20He%20grew%20up%20in%20small%20towns,%20and%20that%20helps%20him%20appreciate%20how%20different%20counties%20have%20different%20needs,%20and%20that%20many%20still%20need%20good%20jobs.%20Here%20is%20a%20speech%20Bill%20gave%20outlining%20his%20jobs%20and%20economy%20plan.%20I’m%20impressed%20by%20Bill’s%20vision%20for%20our%20state%20and%20I%20hope%20you%20will%20vote%20for%20him.%20www.billbryantforgovernor.com/jobs)
I want you to know that I will be voting for Bill Bryant for governor and hope you will too. Bill is focused on generating jobs in communities all across Washington State. He has built an agricultural trade company that operates on both sides of the mountains. He grew up in small towns, and that helps him appreciate how different counties have different needs, and that many still need good jobs. Here is a _[speech Bill gave outlining his jobs and economy plan](http://billbryantforgovernor.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a508ffc703e6fc82360a383e8&id=449a804449&e=32f1a3df98)._ I’m impressed by Bill’s vision for our state and I hope you will vote for him.

[**Homelessness**](mailto:?subject=Bill%20Bryant%20on%20Addressing%20Homelessness&body= I%20am%20sick%20of%20seeing%20how%20so%20many%20of%20our%20communities%20are%20now%20struggling%20with%20homeless%20people%20living%20on%20streets%20and%20in%20tents.%20Bill%20Bryant%20believes%20enabling%20people%20to%20live%20in%20tents%20is%20cruel.%20I%20agree%20and%20it’s%20one%20of%20the%20reasons%20I%20am%20voting%20for%20Bill%20Bryant%20for%20governor%20and%20hope%20you%20will%20too.%20Before%20running%20for%20office%20Bill%20volunteered%20as%20a%20night%20manager%20at%20a%20homeless%20shelter.%20He%20understands%20the%20problem%20and%20also%20understands%20that%20the%20solution%20starts%20with%20having%20a%20zero%20tolerance%20for%20people%20living%20on%20the%20streets.%20I%20am%20voting%20for%20Bill%20and%20hope%20you%20will%20too.%20Learn%20more%20at%20www.billbryantforgovernor.com/streetfeed)
I am sick of seeing how so many of our communities are now struggling with homeless people living on streets and in tents. Bill Bryant believes enabling people to live in tents is cruel. I agree and it’s one of the reasons I am voting for Bill Bryant for governor and hope you will too. Before running for office Bill volunteered as a night manager at a homeless shelter. He understands the problem and also understands that the solution starts with having a zero tolerance for people living on the streets. I am voting for Bill and hope you will too.

[**Environment**](mailto:?subject=Bill%20Bryant%20on%20Addressing%20Homelessness&body=Bill%20Bryant%20deeply%20cares%20about%20our%20state’s%20environment,%20and%20that%20is%20one%20of%20the%20reasons%20I%20am%20voting%20for%20him%20to%20be%20our%20next%20governor.%20Bill%20is%20passionate%20about%20cleaning%20up%20Puget%20Sound%20and%20restoring%20salmon%20and%20steelhead%20runs%20in%20our%20state’s%20rivers.%20He%20has%20worked%20on%20numerous%20environmental%20protection%20projects%20around%20our%20state,%20fought%20to%20protect%20air%20and%20water%20quality%20as%20an%20elected%20King%20County/Seattle%20port%20commissioner,%20and%20will%20carry%20that%20same%20commitment%20to%20the%20governor’s%20office.%20I%20hope%20you%20will%20vote%20for%20Bill%20Bryant%20when%20you%20are%20filling%20out%20your%20ballot.%20For%20more%20info%20visit%20www.billbryantforgovernor.com/protectingpugetsound)
Bill Bryant deeply cares about our state’s environment, and that is one of the reasons I am voting for him to be our next governor. [Bill is passionate about cleaning up Puget Sound](http://billbryantforgovernor.us13.list-manage2.com/track/click?u=a508ffc703e6fc82360a383e8&id=94c8c2ff29&e=32f1a3df98) and restoring salmon and steelhead runs in our state’s rivers. He has worked on numerous environmental protection projects around our state, fought to protect air and water quality as an elected King County/Seattle port commissioner, and will carry that same commitment to the governor’s office. I hope you will vote for Bill Bryant when you are filling out your ballot.

[**Making Government Better Not Bigger**](mailto:?subject=Bill%20Bryant%20on%20Making%20Government%20Better%20Not%20Bigger&body=After%2032%20years%20of%20one%20party%20controlling%20the%20governor’s%20office,%20it’s%20time%20for%20a%20fresh%20perspective.%20I%20believe%20Bill%20Bryant%20will%20go%20to%20Olympia%20and%20scrutinize%20how%20the%20government%20is%20spending%20our%20money,%20focus%20it%20on%20programs%20that%20are%20working%20and%20get%20rid%20of%20the%20programs%20that%20aren’t.%20Bill%20is%20a%20businessman%20and%20as%20an%20elected%20King%20County/%20Seattle%20port%20commissioner%20he%20cut%20taxes.%20He%20knows%20how%20to%20make%20government%20better,%20not%20bigger.%20He’s%20my%20choice%20for%20governor%20and%20I%20hope%20you%20will%20vote%20for%20him.)
After 32 years of one party controlling the governor’s office, it’s time for a fresh perspective. I believe Bill Bryant will go to Olympia and scrutinize how the government is spending our money, focus it on programs that are working and get rid of the programs that aren’t. Bill is a businessman and as an elected King County/ Seattle port commissioner he cut taxes. He knows how to make government better, not bigger. He’s my choice for governor and I hope you will vote for him.
---
| | | | | | | [](http://billbryantforgovernor.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a508ffc703e6fc82360a383e8&id=d503800700&e=32f1a3df98)
---
| | [](http://billbryantforgovernor.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a508ffc703e6fc82360a383e8&id=21aa649af1&e=32f1a3df98)

PO Box 2121, Tacoma, WA 98401

I hope you will vote for Bill Bryant when you are filling out your ballot. mailto:?subject=Bill%20Bryant%20on%20Making%20Government%20Better%20Not%20Bigger&body=After%2032%20years%20of%20one%20party%20controlling%20the%20governor’s%20office,%20it’s%20time%20for%20a%20fresh%20perspective.%20I%20believe%20Bill%20Bryant%20will%20go%20to%20Olympia%20and%20scrutinize%20how%20the%20government%20is%20spending%20our%20money,%20focus%20it%20on%20programs%20that%20are%20working%20and%20get%20rid%20of%20the%20programs%20that%20aren’t.%20Bill%20is%20a%20businessman%20and%20as%20an%20elected%20King%20County/%20Seattle%20port%20commissioner%20he%20cut%20taxes.%20He%20knows%20how%20to%20make%20government%20better,%20not%20bigger.%20He’s%20my%20choice%20for%20governor%20and%20I%20hope%20you%20will%20vote%20for%20him. After 32 years of one party controlling the governor’s office, it’s time for a fresh perspective. I believe Bill Bryant will go to Olympia and scrutinize how the government is spending our money, focus it on programs that are working and get rid of the programs that aren’t. Bill is a businessman and as an elected King County/ Seattle port commissioner he cut taxes. He knows how to make government better, not bigger. He’s my choice for governor and I hope you will vote for him. | | | | | | | | | | | | | Paid for by Washingtonians for Bryant (R) PO Box 2121, Tacoma, WA 98401

name: catherine@dscc.org
subject: We need to talk.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
Trump's implosion? It's not going to win the Senate for us. And the polls that look good now? They don't account for the GOP ad buys we just learned about... Deep breaths, Friend. I just got this note from our Executive Director and I need you to see it.
---
[****](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab?refcode=DPE-20161026-Catherine_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")
**We need to talk, Friend.** Trump's implosion? It's not going to win the Senate for us.

And the polls that look good now? They don't account for these new GOP ad buys we just learned about... from a group with ties to (surprise, surprise) Mitch McConnell.

**[Friend, what we do NOW directly impacts what next week's polls look like. And it will be too late to fight back then. Please, pitch in $1 or whatever you can today.](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab?refcode=DPE-20161026-Catherine_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")**

| **[](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab?refcode=DPE-20161026-Catherine_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")**
---
**More real talk:** In the last 24 hours alone, Nate Silver's model slashed Democrats' win probability by 15 points. **15 points!**

Republicans know how to swoop in at the last minute and buy an election, Friend -- **and with SIX tied races on the map, things could get ugly FAST if we don't act.**

**It 's simple: What we do right now to counteract these buys determines what next week's polls look like. Can we count on you to pitch in $1 right now?**

**[Pitch in $1 IMMEDIATELY>>](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab?refcode=DPE-20161026-Catherine_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=1")

[Pitch in $25 IMMEDIATELY >>](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab?refcode=DPE-20161026-Catherine_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=25")

[Pitch in $35 IMMEDIATELY >>](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab?refcode=DPE-20161026-Catherine_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=35")

[Or donate another amount.](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab?refcode=DPE-20161026-Catherine_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")**

Catherine Algeri

The ONLY way to prevent that from happening is to make the most of our LAST match opportunity. A group of generous donors has agreed to match online donations through midnight Friday, but only if we hit our $21,550 goal. Please, give $3 or more now to make DOUBLE the impact on this race:

clean_body: "" "" "" With just 13 days to go until the election, all eyes are on New Hampshire. If Governor Maggie Hassan loses her Senate race here, we hand the Senate majority (and the power to confirm our next Supreme Court justices) to Washington Republicans. The ONLY way to prevent that from happening is to make the most of our LAST match opportunity. A group of generous donors has agreed to match online donations through midnight Friday, but only if we hit our $21,550 goal. Please, give $3 or more now to make DOUBLE the impact on this race: ** "" Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight indicates that our race is one of the tightest on the map, and The New York Times recently said that ours is "the closest race in the country." Your match contribution could be the difference between electing Maggie and winning back the Senate, or handing control to far-right Republicans backed by corporate special interests. Our records indicate that you may be able to give $3, so we're asking you directly: "" If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: "" "" "" "" This race is as close as they come. With corporate special interests spending $50 MILLION and counting to make sure that Maggie doesn't win, we can't afford to leave a single dollar on the table. The more we raise, the more voters we reach. The more voters we reach, the more likely it is that Maggie wins. Right now, you have double the power to influence this race. "" If we all pull our weight and do everything we can, we can win this thing. Thanks for doing your part, Team Maggie ""

name: Lesley Robinson
subject: Final push
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greg for Montana, PO
body:
Greg for Montana

Final push

Fellow Montanan,

I know we put a lot of emphasis
on fundraising in the campaign, and I'm sure you're all sick of
the television ads.

But to me and to Greg, this race
is about a lot more than just money and negative ads.

Will you join our team?

This is about our families and
yours - and every Montanan who knows we can do better for the
state.

We can push back on all the rules
handed down from Washington that strangle our businesses,
ranchers and farmers, our miners and loggers. We can work to
create high wage jobs and keep our kids here.

Tonight is an important finance
deadline. Rush your contribution of $25, $50, $75 or $100 before
midnight if you can.

Help us in this final push
because Greg and I are ready to go to work for you.

Thank you,

Lesley

Paid for by Greg for Montana, PO
Box 1557, Helena, MT, 59624, Republican

You were added to the system July 8, 2016.

body: Peter, I remember what it was like being in the House minority with Nancy Pelosi as Speaker. To be frank, it was an utter disaster . . . Obamacare was passed without being read . . . conservatives were targeted by the IRS . . . billions of dollars were blown on the failed stimulus bill . . . the list goes on and on. Democrats want to return to those "glory" days. The fact is, they're more concerned with winning than doing what's right for our country. Would you give them another chance to ruin our country? President Obama and Nancy Pelosi have had every opportunity to fix our nation. But they've failed at every turn -- now it's our turn. http://email.granitelists.com/ct/38376804:sHc14muNg:m:3:1155937413:9E802916ECFAA02384E9F75171F2B1BA:r Election Day is in 12 days -- but the outcome of the election will be decided by the crucial October End-of-Month deadline. This is the final fundraising deadline of the year -- we can't afford to have a single conservative sitting on the sidelines. Peter, are you in? http://email.granitelists.com/ct/38376805:sHc14muNg:m:3:1155937413:9E802916ECFAA02384E9F75171F2B1BA:r If conservatives like you do your part, Republicans will be able to celebrate a great victory on Election Day. Crooked Hillary and her corrupt media cheerleaders are going to attack me with more ferocity than ever this last week and a half -- and we can't let their negativity and lies eat into Trump supporter turnout -- we 've got to fight back. Sincerely, Donald J. Trump P.S. Friend, we can 't look back and wish we'd done more \-- we must stay the course and finish this fight with a final push that will knock Crooked Hillary out and bring us a tremendous, historic victory. Thanks again, Donald. Contributions to the Trump Make America Great Again Committee are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. Fellow Conservative,

I remember what it was like being in the House minority with Nancy Pelosi as Speaker.

To be frank, it was an utter disaster . . . _Obamacare was passed without being read . . . conservatives were targeted by the IRS . . . billions of dollars were blown on the failed stimulus bill . . . the list goes on and on._

body:
Put your name on the list – and triple your impact. |

This is the best chance you will have, Friend. TO FUND A LAST-MINUTE AD BLITZ AND GET-OUT-THE-VOTE EFFORT, MY FATHER WILL “TRIPLE MATCH” EVERY DONATION WE RECEIVE FOR THE REST OF OCTOBER. So I am calling on patriotic Americans everywhere who are fed up with DC elites to please chip in one urgent donation ASAP so my father can “triple match” it. DONATE NOW AND MR. TRUMP WILL TRIPLE YOUR GIFT. He’s pouring a huge amount of money into this campaign because he knows you deserve better than what you’ve gotten from the career politicians who have shipped jobs overseas, thrown open our borders, let crime run rampant and left us vulnerable to radical Islamic terrorism. The second my father takes the oath of office next January, he will immediately get to work renegotiating America’s terrible trade deals, building a wall on the border with Mexico, enacting pro-growth tax reform, nominating a conservative judge for the Supreme Court, and working with Congress to repeal and replace ObamaCare. What you do over the next 12 days will determine whether or not all this happens. Will you please make your first-ever donation to my father’s campaign? He will triple match every donation we receive. And he asked me to print the names of everyone in your zip code who makes their first-ever donation to the campaign today. Put your name on the list – and triple your impact – by donating $3, $5, $10, $25, $50 or even more NOW. Thank you! Eric Trump DONATE TO THE TRUMP TRIPLE MATCH CAMPAIGN

subject: Sorry about this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Steve Bullock - Democrat, P
body:
---
Friend,

**This is another fundraising email[asking for $15.](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=rp3tc6heW%2FmKQknSIVb%2FvFCzB6CUl0kF)**

Sorry about that. I'll keep saying that this is by far my least favorite part of the campaign.

But approximately **_130,000 Montanans have already voted_** in this race. That's while Greg Gianforte has topped $5 million in self-funding and is blanketing TV and radio airwaves with false commercials, filling up mail boxes with attack flyers and bombarding voters with digital ads.

Tonight at midnight is our final financial deadline before the election. **I'm asking you to help make sure we close out this race strong.[Pitch in $15.](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=s8XwZZc1QpZ8e9pK4oXkHVCzB6CUl0kF)**

Thanks,

Steve Bullock ************
---
| [**DONATE**](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=EQKZk8hZqpsQZCmqYpUdO1CzB6CUl0kF)
---
| Paid for by Friends of Steve Bullock - Democrat, P.O. Box 1330, Helena, MT 59624
---
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
If you no longer wish to receive updates from our campaign, please [unsubscribe](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=Up%2FZsTFSlPG5jP4oaibNdVCzB6CUl0kF).

Friends of Steve Bullock
Post Office Box 1330
Helena MT 59624 United States
---

name: Ben Carson
subject: A personal request
body:
Peter,

With Election Day less than 2 weeks away, I know you've been
getting inundated with emails.

But I'd like to make a personal request today that you support
the work of My Faith Votes with an immediate, tax-deductible
donation.

myfaithvotes.z2systems.com/np/clients/myfaithvotes/donation.jsp?campaign=98

Frankly, the time is running out to make a difference. But
they're now pulling out all the stops.

They tripled their airtime on Christian radio, added 3 more
national events to their already jam-packed schedule, and
launched a new video campaign on social media -- all to reach
millions more Christians.

All of this has been made possible because of the generous
donations made to My Faith Votes so far, but with just 12 days to
go, they're still not where they need to be.

They need to reach more students from Christian colleges and
universities.

They need to reach more Christians who are registered to vote,
but haven't been voting.

They need to air more PSA's on TV and radio states in swing
states.

Only your continued support can help them hit their goals, and I
strongly urge you to help.

myfaithvotes.z2systems.com/np/clients/myfaithvotes/donation.jsp?campaign=98

Time is running out.

Thank you for your commitment, it means the world to me, and to
the team at My Faith Votes.

Sincerely,

Ben Carson

Donate:
myfaithvotes.z2systems.com/np/clients/myfaithvotes/donation.jsp?campaign=98

reserved

MyFaithVotes | PO Box 1340 | Merrifield, VA
22116

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
Join Team Trump by midnight on Monday, and for every $1 you contribute I’ll match $3. |

Friend, I know you’ve supported me through the last year and a half, and I can’t thank you enough. But I have to ask you for more right now. We really can win this election and Make America Great Again. We can overcome the rigged system and the big spending Clinton cronies on November 8th. But it’s going to come down to the wire. And that’s why I’m making right now is the best opportunity yet for supporters like you to get more involved. Getting you on board is so important to me, I will match your support 3 to 1. That’s right – I will TRIPLE MATCH any contribution you make today, so that it makes four times the impact in our final ad buys and get-out-the-vote efforts. CONTRIBUTE $100 = BECOMES $400 WITH MATCH CONTRIBUTE $50 = BECOMES $200 WITH MATCH CONTRIBUTE $35 = BECOMES $140 WITH MATCH CONTRIBUTE $20 = BECOMES $80 WITH MATCH CONTRIBUTE $10 = BECOMES $40 WITH MATCH CONTRIBUTE ANY AMOUNT - I WILL TRIPLE MATCH IT We need to close October strong, and enter November ready to fight this battle 24/7 until the polls close on Election Day. We can’t leave anything to chance and we can’t leave anything on the table. That’s why I am making this HUGE final investment to win, by triple matching every contribution we receive by midnight on Monday, October 31st. I can’t thank you enough for standing with me in this race. We’re on the cusp of a historic victory that will shock the establishment, thanks to millions of supporters like you. It’s time to close strong over the next 12 days and win... and I need every supporter who has not contributed to invest in our campaign IMMEDIATELY. Join today with an urgently needed financial contribution, and I’ll triple match it. Every donation will make a direct impact in the outcome on Election Day. You’ll be so proud when we WIN and get to work to Make America Great Again. Thank you! Best wishes, Donald J. Trump CONTRIBUTE $100 = BECOMES $400 WITH MATCH

Contributions to the Trump Make America Great Again Committee are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

name: MaggieHassan.com
subject: POLL: Ayotte +3 (match in effect) >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdb55/2a380d31/177fd794/ffe2e9/33904810/VEsH/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdb55/2a380d31/177fd794/ffe2e9/33904810/VEsE/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
I really hate to lose, team.
But our race here in New Hampshire will decide Senate control and the future of the Supreme Court, and a poll released on Tuesday shows that thanks to the $50 MILLION and counting in spending from Ayotte's special interest backers, if the election were held today, we would LOSE.
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdb55/2a380d31/177fd794/ffe2ea/33904810/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoibGFzdC1tYXRjaCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTYxMDI3XzEwMjZVTWFzc1BvbGxNYXRjaC1OT19uaC1uZCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIn0=/ "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/last-match?refcode=e20161027_1026UMassPollMatch-NO_nh-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")
With just 12 days left, we're running out of time to pull ahead. That's why a group of generous donors has stepped up to DOUBLE online gifts, but only if we hit our $21,550 goal by tomorrow at midnight.
Our records indicate that you may be able to help us take the lead with a $3 donation. Please, I'm asking you directly: **[Give $3 or more now to potentially DOUBLE your impact in the fight to help elect Governor Hassan to the Senate, win back the majority, and secure the future of the Supreme Court.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdb55/2a380d31/177fd794/ffe2eb/33904810/VEsC/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoibGFzdC1tYXRjaCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTYxMDI3XzEwMjZVTWFzc1BvbGxNYXRjaC1OT19uaC1uZCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/last-match?refcode=e20161027_1026UMassPollMatch-NO_nh-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
**[Click to donate $3 (and it could become $6!)](http://act.maggiehassan. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/last-match?refcode=e20161027_1026UMassPollMatch-NO_nh-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=3")**
**[Click to donate $25 (and it could become $50!)](http://act.maggiehassan. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/last-match?refcode=e20161027_1026UMassPollMatch-NO_nh-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=25")**
**[Click to donate $50 (and it could become $100!)](http://act.maggiehassan. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/last-match?refcode=e20161027_1026UMassPollMatch-NO_nh-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=50")**
**[Or click here to donate another amount.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdb55/2a380d31/177fd794/ffe2eb/33904810/VEsO/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoibGFzdC1tYXRjaCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTYxMDI3XzEwMjZVTWFzc1BvbGxNYXRjaC1OT19uaC1uZCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/last-match?refcode=e20161027_1026UMassPollMatch-NO_nh-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")**
We're not kidding when we say that your gift now, during this match campaign, could be the difference between winning here in New Hampshire and handing Senate control to Washington Republicans.
With the Senate majority and our next Supreme Court justices on the line, there is too much at stake to wake up on November 9 wishing we had done just a little bit more.
**[Please, give $3 or more now-- every dollar you can -- to potentially DOUBLE your impact on this critically important race.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdb55/2a380d31/177fd794/ffe2eb/33904810/VEsP/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoibGFzdC1tYXRjaCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTYxMDI3XzEwMjZVTWFzc1BvbGxNYXRjaC1OT19uaC1uZCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/last-match?refcode=e20161027_1026UMassPollMatch-NO_nh-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")**

clean_body: "" "" I really hate to lose, team. But our race here in New Hampshire will decide Senate control and the future of the Supreme Court, and a poll released on Tuesday shows that thanks to the $50 MILLION and counting in spending from Ayotte's special interest backers, if the election were held today, we would LOSE. "" With just 12 days left, we're running out of time to pull ahead. That's why a group of generous donors has stepped up to DOUBLE online gifts, but only if we hit our $21,550 goal by tomorrow at midnight. Our records indicate that you may be able to help us take the lead with a $3 donation. Please, I'm asking you directly: "" If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: "" "" "" "" We're not kidding when we say that your gift now, during this match campaign, could be the difference between winning here in New Hampshire and handing Senate control to Washington Republicans. With the Senate majority and our next Supreme Court justices on the line, there is too much at stake to wake up on November 9 wishing we had done just a little bit more. "" Thanks for being a team player, Marc Goldberg Campaign Manager, Maggie for NH ""

name: Bradley Whitford
subject: You know what Josh Lyman would say to that?
disclaimer_text: paid for by Russ for Wisconsin, Joe Sensenbrenner, Madison, WI, Treasurer
body:
Join me in supporting Russ. | [](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4651/1c469400/1e77b62/3542307/407897111/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/oct-eom?utm_source=ema_2016-10-27_oct_eom3_nd&refcode=ema_2016-10-27_oct_eom3_nd&utm_campaign=oct_eom3&utm_medium=ema") Friend, Growing up in Wisconsin meant learning all about the state's heroes -- like Robert "Fighting Bob" La Follette, one of the founders of the progressive movement; and Senator Gaylord Nelson, the visionary behind Earth Day. What can I say? We Sconnies love progressives. That's why we love Russ Feingold. **Right now, Russ is in the fight of his life against Senator Ron Johnson. This is the guy who's leading the Senate Tea Party Caucus. The same guy the Koch brothers call their "model legislator." Progressives, we _must_ win this race.** **[Will you stand with me in support of Russ Feingold with a contribution of $5?](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4651/1c469400/1e77b62/3542307/407897111/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/oct-eom?utm_source=ema_2016-10-27_oct_eom3_nd&refcode=ema_2016-10-27_oct_eom3_nd&utm_campaign=oct_eom3&utm_medium=ema")** [](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4651/1c469400/1e77b62/3542307/407897111/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/oct-eom?utm_source=ema_2016-10-27_oct_eom3_nd&refcode=ema_2016-10-27_oct_eom3_nd&utm_campaign=oct_eom3&utm_medium=ema") [](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4651/1c469400/1e77b62/3542307/407897111/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/oct-eom?utm_source=ema_2016-10-27_oct_eom3_nd&refcode=ema_2016-10-27_oct_eom3_nd&utm_campaign=oct_eom3&utm_medium=ema") _Or, if your payment information is saved with ActBlue, click below and your contribution will go through immediately:_ | | [$5 »](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4651/1c469400/1e77b62/3542304/407897111/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/oct-eom?utm_source=ema_2016-10-27_oct_eom3_nd&refcode=ema_2016-10-27_oct_eom3_nd&utm_campaign=oct_eom3&utm_medium=ema&express_lane=true&amount=5")
---
| | [$25 »](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4651/1c469400/1e77b62/3542305/407897111/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/oct-eom?utm_source=ema_2016-10-27_oct_eom3_nd&refcode=ema_2016-10-27_oct_eom3_nd&utm_campaign=oct_eom3&utm_medium=ema&express_lane=true&amount=25")
---
| [$100 »](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4651/1c469400/1e77b62/3542302/407897111/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/oct-eom?utm_source=ema_2016-10-27_oct_eom3_nd&refcode=ema_2016-10-27_oct_eom3_nd&utm_campaign=oct_eom3&utm_medium=ema&express_lane=true&amount=100")
---
| | [Other »](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4651/1c469400/1e77b62/3542303/407897111/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/oct-eom?utm_source=ema_2016-10-27_oct_eom3_nd&refcode=ema_2016-10-27_oct_eom3_nd&utm_campaign=oct_eom3&utm_medium=ema&express_lane_other")
---
In 2010, the Koch brothers did everything in their power to tear down Wisconsin's progressive fabric. They bought Governor Scott Walker to do their bidding at the capitol, and Senator Johnson to do their bidding in Washington.
But I'm so hopeful. Back in 2011, I joined thousands and thousands of my fellow Wisconsinites at our state capitol to protest Governor Walker's attack on workers. That's the moment when I knew we could take Wisconsin back from the Koch brothers, billionaires, and right-wing special interest groups.
Right now, even though Russ is in the lead, he's seen polls that have him within the margin of error -- or even _down._ No matter what he and his campaign do -- no matter how much money they raise -- it will always be them vs. the GOP establishment.
You see, Russ isn't just running against Senator Ron Johnson. He's up against the _fifteen_ right-wing groups that are supporting Senator Johnson, including the Koch brothers and their network of extreme right-wing donors.
You know what Josh Lyman would say to that?_Game on._
**It's so important to me -- and to all of us -- that Russ wins in November. So I have one question for you: Are you all in for Russ?[Donate $5 right now to help him reach his FINAL end-of-month goal.](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4651/1c469400/1e77b62/3542307/407897111/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/oct-eom?utm_source=ema_2016-10-27_oct_eom3_nd&refcode=ema_2016-10-27_oct_eom3_nd&utm_campaign=oct_eom3&utm_medium=ema")**
Russ is a progressive champion. He listens, he works hard, and you can always count on him to put the wonderful people of Wisconsin first. That's why I'm proud to do all that I can to get him elected.
Thanks,
Bradley Whitford
[CONTRIBUTE »](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4651/1c469400/1e77b62/3542307/407897111/VEsHBQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/oct-eom?utm_source=ema_2016-10-27_oct_eom3_nd&refcode=ema_2016-10-27_oct_eom3_nd&utm_campaign=oct_eom3&utm_medium=ema")
---

name: Mike Weinholtz
subject: Trump, Pence, & Herbert—plus NEW video!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Weinholtz for Governor
body:
| | Did you hear that Mike Pence was in Utah yesterday for a Trump rally?
---
| | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/-3911171756756104448/-8910140972054934784?v=Rn1nUIY45zU) Dear Peter, Did you hear that Mike Pence was in Utah yesterday for a Trump rally? Mike Pence claims to be a Christian, but joined Trump--who has mocked religion and people of faith over and over. Governor Herbert also claims to be a man of faith, but when Trump questioned Mitt Romney's Mormonism or proposed banning all Muslims, what did the Governor say? Nothing. Silence. Like Mike Pence, Gary Herbert doesn't stand up for religion when it counts, and Utah deserves better! **[Check out our new video:](https://act.myngp.com/el/-3911171756756104448/-8910140972054934784?v=Rn1nUIY45zU)** [](https://act.myngp.com/el/-3911171756756104448/-8766025783979078912?v=Rn1nUIY45zU) It's time for elected officials who will practice what they preach and stand up for people of faith! **[Sign up TODAY to volunteer if you agree!](https://act.myngp.com/el/-3911171756756104448/-8693968189941150976)** Let's work together to make sure that ALL people--no matter their religion or how they worship--are safe and welcome in Utah! Together with you,
Mike | Paid for by Mike Weinholtz for Governor

name: Jay McDonald
subject: Rob stands up for law enforcement
body:
| Peter -- Law enforcement in Ohio needs a Senator who will have our backs. That’s why when we looked at both candidates in the race for United States Senate, the Fraternal Order of Police (FOP) of Ohio decided to endorse Rob Portman after supporting Governor Strickland in 2006 and 2010.

Rob stands up for law enforcement. And he knows how to bring Republicans, Democrats, and Independents together to help address the challenges facing our state and nation.

Rob has been a leader in fighting the prescription drug and heroin epidemic that is gripping our state. His legislation - the Comprehensive Addiction and Recovery Act - will help Ohio communities start to fight back. And it will help save lives.

[](https://www.robportman.com/watch_strong?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fop_outreach&n=1)
I hope you will [click here](https://www.robportman.com/watch_strong?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fop_outreach&n=2) to learn more about why the Ohio FOP is backing Rob Portman, and I hope you will join me in voting for Rob Portman on November 8th.

Sincerely, Jay McDonald
National Vice President and Ohio President
Fraternal Order of Police [

](http://www.robportman.com/?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fop_outreach&n=3) [](https://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Frobportman&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fop_outreach&n=4)[](https://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Ftwitter.com%2Frobportman&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fop_outreach&n=5)[

](https://www.robportman.com/protecting_jobs_contribute?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fop_outreach&n=6)
---
-=-=-
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](http://www.robportman.com/unsubscribe?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fop_outreach&n=7). -=-=-

This rally is important. We need to show undecided voters -- and the media -- that ours is the movement that will take Indiana forward.

**[Will you join me on Saturday at 10:00 a.m. in Sandborn?](https://act.myngp.com/el/4755657839580940288/8183464435290343424?utm_campaign=fld_sndbrn_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=gregg&source=em16_161027_fld_gq_sndbrn_ful__jg)**

John

subject: No do-overs
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Team Ryan, a joint fundraising committee authorized
body: Peter, I remember what it was like being in the House minority with Nancy Pelosi as Speaker. To be frank, it was an utter disaster . . . Obamacare was passed without being read . . . conservatives were targeted by the IRS . . . billions of dollars were blown on the failed stimulus bill . . . the list goes on and on. Democrats want to return to those "glory" days. The fact is, they're more concerned with winning than doing what's right for our country. Would you give them another chance to ruin our country? President Obama and Nancy Pelosi have had every opportunity to fix our nation. But they've failed at every turn -- now it's our turn. http://email.granitelists.com/ct/38398102:s2ISXyuNm:m:3:1155937413:B4A06AF44C8B004ECBCE97C7BEA625C1:r Election Day is in 12 days -- but the outcome of the election will be decided by the crucial October End-of-Month deadline. body:
We still have one Final End of the Month Goal that we need to meet to guarantee a Trump Presidency. |

Friend, By this time next month, we’ll be busy scouting the right people to make the best changes for our country in a new Trump Administration. But Friend, we’re not there yet. We still have one Final End of the Month Goal that we need to meet to guarantee a Trump Presidency. So will you donate $35, $50 or $100 to make sure we meet our Final End of the Month Goal? Mr. Trump has told me how energized he is to see so many Americans at every rally who are so excited to take our country back. I know you’re excited too Friend, because this is our chance to make history . . . our chance to make America great again . . . our chance to destroy politics as usual in DC, and have a President who cares about the American people. This is our chance Friend, please don’t miss out. Contribute $35, $50 or $100, right now to make sure that we hit our Final End of the Month Goal. And I will make sure to tell Mr. Trump how your contribution helped us get there. Thanks, Brad Parscale Digital Director, Donald Trump for President CONTRIBUTE $100

body:
Peter,
This Saturday, October 29th, Eric's Mission for Missouri bus tour is crossing the state! There is just over a week till the election, and Eric is working hard to hear what is important to voters across Missouri.

We'd love to see you at one of Eric's events this weekend! Eric will be answering questions and discussing his plan to take Missouri in a new direction, away from crooked career politicians like Chris Koster.

We hope you can make it out to one!

Warrensburg Town Hall
10:00 am
Heroes Restaurant & Pub

Warrensburg, MO 64093

You must be a detail oriented, all-around awesome person who is a big supporter — you should volunteer (http://ericgreitens.com/volunteer?utm_source=Master+List&utm_campaign=f7b0cffa43-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2016_10_26&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_3f71c40094-f7b0cffa43-99411629) with us!
clean_body: Peter, This Saturday, October 29th, Eric's Mission for Missouri bus tour is crossing the state! There is just over a week till the election, and Eric is working hard to hear what is important to voters across Missouri. We'd love to see you at one of Eric's events this weekend! Eric will be answering questions and discussing his plan to take Missouri in a new direction, away from crooked career politicians like Chris Koster. We hope you can make it out to one! body:
| |

| Okay, team -- Did you see the latest _OS Poll_? At 12 days to go, we're TIED with Marco Rubio! We have to capitalize on this moment right now. [**Can you step up and donate now?**](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2e7c/738133e4/32653124/7f859113/2922765375/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme161027?refcode=pme161027_m&recur_weekly=true&amount=10") | [](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2e7c/738133e4/32653124/7f859113/2922765375/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme161027?refcode=pme161027_m&recur_weekly=true&amount=10")
---
This race is in a dead heat because of you. Last night's debate made one thing incredibly clear: we can defeat Marco Rubio and end his political career once and for all. **[Contribute right now to help us make this count>>](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2e7c/738133e4/32653124/7f859113/2922765375/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme161027?refcode=pme161027_m&recur_weekly=true&amount=10")**
_What 's even more incredible is that this isn't just one poll _\-- **it 's a much larger trend. **Here's the latest:
* Last week, the _New York Times_ endorsed our campaign
* President Obama took Marco Rubio to task for his absenteeism
* AND Patrick joined Hillary on the campaign trail!

But here's the bad news: we're being outspent 4 to 1! Rubio's special interest allies are blanketing the airwaves with their lying attacks -- and we're afraid it might be enough to drown us out. [**Can you chip in to stop Rubio, turn Florida blue, and retake the Senate?**](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2e7c/738133e4/32653124/7f85910c/2922765375/VEsD/ "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme161027?refcode=pme161027_m&recur_weekly=true&amount=10")

name: Team Ross
subject: bailing out Burr
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Deborah Ross for Senate Deborah Ross for Senate
body:
| |
---
| |
---
| At the beginning of the election season, when Republicans were devising a strategy to protect their Senate majority, North Carolina was not a factor.

Senator Burr's seat was supposed to be an easy win for the GOP.

**Now with two weeks left to go, Republicans are rushing in $2 million worth of advertising to save Burr 's campaign.**

They are panicking because if Deborah wins, their hopes for holding on to control of the Senate fly out the window.

[_**We 've brought this race to dead even. Let's make sure the GOP's last-ditch attempts to save Burr's seat fail. Help Deborah pull ahead by contributing $5.**_](https://secure.deborahross.com/page/m/45f427b8/2cc31c44/55b310e/19f9b90d/2894581296/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dre161027?refcode=dre161027_m&recur_weekly=true&amount=5")

_Rothenberg & Gonzales_ moved our race to a "Toss Up," and the latest poll by Siena College has Deborah up by one over Senator Burr.

Deborah has been working hard on the campaign trail and traveling all over the state. **She 's spent this entire campaign listening to voters, while Senator Burr's spent it supporting Donald Trump.**

Now Deborah needs resources to keep it up. We have to answer GOP attack ads, go door-to-door with our message, and coordinate a huge Get Out The Vote effort.

[_**Don 't leave Deborah hanging when we're this close to victory. Rush in $5.**_](https://secure.deborahross.com/page/m/45f427b8/2cc31c44/55b310e/19f9b90d/2894581296/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dre161027?refcode=dre161027_m&recur_weekly=true&amount=5")

Thank you,

Team Ross |

body:

"https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab?refcode=DPE-20161027-JustIn_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

_**BREAKING: McConnell 's $25 MILLION Is Hitting Our Candidates HARD**_
[**We 've got to fight back or risk losing it all! Help our candidates TODAY>>**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab?refcode=DPE-20161027-JustIn_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")
Friend, Nate Silver's mid-week Senate projections show critical races TIGHTER THAN EVER:
★ **Jason Kander** (Missouri) has a **54%** chance of winning
★ **Katie McGinty** (Pennsylvania) has a **53%** chance of winning
★ **Catherine Cortez Masto** (Nevada) has a **49%** chance of winning
★ **And Maggie Hassan** (New Hampshire) has a **48%** chance of winning These projections come after McConnell's favorite Super PAC handed over **$25 MILLION to attack our candidates and CRUSH all hope of winning back the majority!**

**Senate control and our future are riding on what we do next. Please pitch in ASAP to fight back against special interests and help Democrats retake the momentum!**

**[Pitch in $1 IMMEDIATELY>>](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab?refcode=DPE-20161027-JustIn_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=1")

[Pitch in $35 IMMEDIATELY >>](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab?refcode=DPE-20161027-JustIn_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=35")

[Or donate another amount.](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab?refcode=DPE-20161027-JustIn_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")**

We can't let the GOP's dark money block us from winning battleground states. **But that 's EXACTLY what's happening - _and we 're running out of time to fight back!_**

Friend, Democrats get one shot at this and your gift could be the difference between victory and defeat. [**Will you pitch in to give our candidates critical resources before it 's too late?**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab?refcode=DPE-20161027-JustIn_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

Thanks,
Team DSCC

**Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee
120 Maryland Ave. NE
Washington, DC 20002** Paid for by the DSCC, dscc.org,
and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of the DSCC's grassroots network. Please add us to your address book or approved senders list to make sure you keep receiving DSCC updates. Together, we're going to take back the Senate in November, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. If you'd like to stop receiving all emails from the DSCC, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ea88/2b07114c/4b7f89e5/73ab707c/3079412276/VEsHAg/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/content/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). name: Justice for Governor
subject: A Bunch of Bull
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Justice for Governor
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/5569970444763006976/6814933098523133952?refcode=home)
**Watch our newest ad called 'Hope'**

Bill Cole is trying to sell West Virginia voters a bunch of bull! We put out a new ad to set the record straight.

When many coal companies filed for bankruptcy; Jim Justice stepped up support our coal miners. Jim took on the debts of failing companies. Jim made the decision to stay and fight to keep hard-working West Virginians on the job.

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/5569970444763006976/6886990692561061888?v=RlY-lyqd-Cg)

[CLICK HERE TO WATCH OUR NEW TV AD.](https://act.myngp.com/el/5569970444763006976/6886990692561061888?v=RlY-lyqd-Cg)

Please share this video with your contacts and expose the "bull" coming from Bill Cole and his special interest friends.

Thanks,
Team Justice

| Dear Peter,

****Friday, October 28th: Bensalem, PA
**** TC Millwork, Inc.
3344 Marshall Lane
Bensalem, PA 19020
**
**

Doors Open: 12:00 PM
Event Begins: 2:00 PM

Team Trump–Pence

body:
Your immediate financial help is critical to keep the Trump for President Ad campaign on TV’s everywhere. |

This is it, Friend - Our campaign is up on the air with our final ad blitz of the whole election. With Hillary Clinton dominating the airwaves thanks to her huge contributions from liberal elites, AND all her media friends lying about me on TV all day, our final ad blitz needs to be huge. Please contribute $35, $50 or $100 to help keep our ads on the air until the polls close November 8th. CONTRIBUTE $35 CONTRIBUTE $50 CONTRIBUTE $100 CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT Everyone who sees my ads will understand I alone can bring real change to D.C. They will know I am serious about creating jobs, standing up to China, securing the border, upholding the 2nd Amendment, defeating terrorism and getting criminal illegal aliens out of our country. And they will know I am 100% independent from the lobbyists and elites who have done severe damage to our country. Take this last chance you will have before election day to spread our Make America Great Again message to millions of people. As long as you contribute today, your gift of $35, $50 or $100 will help purchase TV air time in key markets. If you wait to contribute tomorrow, it will be too late, Friend. We need to buy more 30-second ad slots now. TODAY. Please make that happen with your urgent contribution. Thank you, Donald J. Trump FUND THE FINAL TRUMP FOR PRESIDENT AD BLITZ

Contributions to the Trump Make America Great Again Committee are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

body:
Directly from me | | Derek --

I want you to to hear this update directly from me.

Our final budgets of the campaign are locked in -- we know what we need to spend in every state and every field office, and what our costs will be for every one of the next 12 days.

But today marks a week straight of failing to meet our fundraising targets. **[Unless we start turning things around and FAST](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=16&ms=MjY5MDY2MDIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTA0ODcxMjQ0S0&mt=1&rt=0)** , we’re going to begin dialing back some of our commitments.

That’s why it’s so important that our team is as strong as possible -- and that you make your first donation now. **[We’ve set a goal of three million donors by the end of October -- will you be one of the 8 folks from your area we still need to join our team today and help reach this goal?](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=18&ms=MjY5MDY2MDIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTA0ODcxMjQ0S0&mt=1&rt=0)**

Your dollars are going straight into the field operation that will get out the vote and elect Hillary our president in less than two weeks. So don’t miss your chance to own a small piece of this campaign -- Hillary’s counting on all of us now more than she ever has.

**Chip in $1 before the end of the month -- join the team and help hit our 3 million donor goal.** | **You’re one of our most committed supporters. If you've saved your payment information, your donation will go through immediately:

name: Katie McGinty
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
body:
Wow -- it's hard to believe how close we are.

For over **__12 months__** now, I've had the honor of traveling across Pennsylvania. The folks I meet every day are ready for a change -- they're sick of seeing Pat Toomey put Wall Street's interests ahead of theirs. They're tired of his hyper-partisanship and the Washington gridlock.

Now, in just **__12 days__** , we'll have the opportunity to change the course of the Senate and Supreme Court, just by winning here in Pennsylvania. **But all this could slip away if we let Toomey 's big-money allies drown us out in the home stretch.**

[**Team, the polls show this race is in a *_dead heat_ *. Can I count on you to chip in before the most critical end-of-month deadline of the campaign? >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-3384238370149367808/-7618938281324969984?refcode=e20161027.3&refcode2=e20161027.3nd&amount=25)

**[Quick, pitch in>>](https://act.myngp.com/el/-3384238370149367808/-7618938281324969984?refcode=e20161027.3&refcode2=e20161027.3nd&amount=25)**
This team has always found the grassroots grit to rally against the odds. Now with __**millions**__ suddenly pouring in to prop up Toomey's campaign in this final sprint, I need to know you're in this fight with me.

**Let 's keep up the fight for working families. Chip in $5, or whatever you can:**

[**www.katiemcginty.com/final-sprint**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-3384238370149367808/-7618938281324969984?refcode=e20161027.3&refcode2=e20161027.3nd&amount=25)

Thank you,

Katie

---
| *** A note on donations ***

There are only 12 days left in this race, and the polls are in a virtual tie. Katie is fighting for working families in PA -- but we're up against major special interest spending. Can you make a grassroots donation today to help Katie win this race and take back the Senate?
**Chip in $5 today. Thank you.**

**[Donate Now](https://act.myngp.com/el/-3384238370149367808/-7618938281324969984?refcode=e20161027.3&refcode2=e20161027.3nd&amount=25)**
---
---
| | Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
If you no longer wish to receive updates from our campaign, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/-3384238370149367808/-6105728806528483328).

Katie McGinty for Senate
PO Box 22447
Philadelphia PA 19110 United States

**Evan 's opponents "panicking," making "major last-minute investment"
\-- (_Politico_)**

**This could change everything -- UNLESS WE FIGHT BACK!
[Chip in $5 to help us hit our _last_ end-of-month goal.
All gifts MATCHED >>](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a505c3/7be36b49/1e0326b8/78f9d941/1987080434/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/eb-finaleom?refcode=20161027.2nd&amount=10")** Friend -- "We're going to go out guns blazing." That's what Mitch McConnell's Super PAC ally said about their last-minute **_$25 million_** spend in Indiana and 5 other states. They're leaving everything on the table -- **[which means we have to, too!](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a505c3/7be36b49/1e0326b8/78f9d941/1987080434/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/eb-finaleom?refcode=20161027.2nd&amount=10")**

Look:
* _Politico_ just reported that Indiana's Senate seat is one of the most likely to flip.
* So now Evan's opponents are "panicking" and throwing _everything they have_ at keeping this seat in special interest hands.
* That means _another_ $4 million of negative ads designed to turn voters against Evan.

We can't let them get away with this -- this new money dump could rip away Evan's victory! **But we must, must, MUST hit our $60,000 end-of-month goal to be able to fight back.

[Friend, you've stood with us this far -- can you help us now? Your gift will be MATCHED through the 10/31 deadline, giving it twice the impact!](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a505c3/7be36b49/1e0326b8/78f9d941/1987080434/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/eb-finaleom?refcode=20161027.2nd&amount=10")**

body:
|

| |

---|---
| **FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE**
**October 27, 2016**

**Media Contact:**
Ethan Latour
[ethan@philscott.org](mailto:ethan@philscott.org)
802-595-3776
**FORMER PLANNED PARENTHOOD BOARD MEMBER & VOLUNTEER OF THE YEAR REJECTS PAC’S ‘DISTORTIONS AND LIES’ **

**_Long-time Planned Parenthood leader outraged by smear campaign from the organization’s PAC_**
**Middlesex, Vt., October 27, 2016 –** A former Planned Parenthood board member and volunteer of the year is condemning the “distortions and lies” the organization’s Political Action Committee is spreading about Phil Scott’s record. Scott has consistently been pro-choice, defended a woman’s right to choose and supported Planned Parenthood, and has repeatedly said he would continue to do so as Governor.

In a new 60-second video released today, Morgan, Vermont resident Candy Moot expresses outrage over recent attack ads deceiving Vermonters on Phil Scott’s long-standing pro-choice position and his support of the Planned Parenthood organization itself.

Moot explains that while she’s been involved with Planned Parenthood for forty years – serving on its Board of Directors, earning a Volunteer of the Year award and working on the Equal Rights Amendment campaign – she’s “outraged and sickened that Planned Parenthood has distorted the position Phil Scott takes today and has always taken.”

“Phil Scott is pro-choice and has always been pro-choice,” she says. “That’s why I am particularly disappointed to see these distortions and lies. Because that’s what they are,” Moot added.

“Vermonters know Phil, and we’re hearing from many supporters who are as outraged as Candy about the dishonest ads that are meant to deceive and divide us,” said Brittney Wilson, spokeswoman for the Phil Scott campaign. “We’re disappointed in the ads and that Phil’s opponent has refused to disavow the deceitful smear tactics. We’re grateful Vermonters are stepping up and demonstrating that we all see through these tactics. Even though these dishonest attacks are deeply disappointing to all of us, Phil has said he’ll always be a strong supporter of the non-political, non-partisan work of Planned Parenthood in providing important women’s health services.”

In the video Moot, the long time Planned Parenthood advocate concludes, “Planned Parenthood needs to be ashamed of themselves for the ads its PAC has been running.”

Watch the full ad here:
---
| [ ](http://philscott.us13.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=16876c0d8c&e=19cebfe173 "Candy Moot - Outraged")
---
Phil Scott for Vermont: Right Direction
| | | | | | [](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=64b86a47ef&e=19cebfe173)

With SIX Senate races TIED, Mitch McConnell's cash cavalry is BLANKETING the airwaves in, _you guessed it_ , SIX Senate races.

| This will be quick. It has to be.

Republicans are going all-out for Senator Burr right now. **They 've taken $2 million from a $15 million line of credit to run ads for him in North Carolina.**

We don't know what exactly these ads will say, but it's safe to assume that they'll be attempts to tar my record with lies and distortions.

**Republicans are desperate.** They're going to throw everything they've got at us because losing Burr's seat means losing their majority.

This could really hurt us in the final two weeks if we can't respond quick enough.

[_**We 're too close to victory to let it slip away. Please help us get the resources we need to fight back. Chip in $5 or $10.**_](https://secure.deborahross.com/page/m/45f427a7/2cc31c44/55fd804/19f9b811/1071208887/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dre161027pm?refcode=dre161027pm_m&recur_weekly=true&amount=5")

We’ve got momentum on our side — and with Election Day right around the corner, it couldn’t come at a better time! | | | | | | | |
---|---|---
| | | | Friend, We’ve got momentum on our side — and with Election Day right around the corner, it couldn’t come at a better time! **The future of Indiana will come down to our victory on Election Day.** Either we can continue Indiana’s forward momentum and take our state to the next level or we fall back to the tried-and-failed liberal policies of the past. **We need every Team Holcomb supporter to cast their ballot and make their voice heard this election. Do you know how you’ll vote this year?**

name: Team Inslee
subject: Ballot surge
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
The first votes are already in. [](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=OTc3MTI1OQS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTAyMjE3NDQ5MQS2&mt=1&rt=0)
| Friend -- as you read this, **the first surge of returned ballots is underway**. This week, thousands of Washingtonians voted and, if this year is anything like 2012, many of them left their choice for governor blank -- this is a very real scenario in this election if we don't do our job to mobilize voters. **In fact, in 2012, over 50,000 Washingtonians who voted for president didn 't fill in their vote for governor. ** Jay needs your vote. That's why we're in the field, working every single day to make sure Democrats are completing their ballots -- voting for Jay and voting all the way through -- and returning them, because too much is at stake this year to do anything less. **We need to ensure every Democrat in Washington votes for Jay, and progressives up and down the ballot. No ifs, ands, or buts. It 's that important.** [**So we 've set up a Ballot Completion Project and need $25,000 to fund it -- can you contribute $5 to help toward that goal?**](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=OTc3MTI1OQS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTAyMjE3NDQ5MQS2&mt=2&rj=MTAyMjE3NDQ5MQS2&rt=0) _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [EXPRESS DONATE $10 »](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=23&ms=OTc3MTI1OQS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTAyMjE3NDQ5MQS2&mt=2&rj=MTAyMjE3NDQ5MQS2&rt=0)
