clean_body: | | | | | Dear Peter, We have had a great response to our get out the vote effort on the first day of early voting. The comments on our Facebook page are unbelievably positive. We are on target to contact 25,000 key voters through our grassroots efforts this week. We 'll also reach half a million more with our targeted online strategy. We need your support to fund our grassroots efforts to stay on target to defeat the establishment by getting our vote out early through November 1. The obstacles are great as our opposition is funded by the billionaire supported PAC that backed John McCain and took out leading constitutional conservative Congressman Tim Hulescamp on behalf of the establishment. Help us reach our targeted outreach goals. Every $1 you donate can help us reach 500 targeted voters. Everyone who helps us reach our voter outreach target from now until November 1 will be automatically entered into our "On Target Pack" giveaway, which includes some campaign goodies and a ready-to-hunt crossbow. | | | Sincerely, Col. Rob Maness | | | | PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF COLONEL ROB MANESS Friends of Colonel Rob Maness · United States

name: Van Hollen HQ
subject: Have you voted yet?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
|
[](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91a9b/70cdc2ba/47363569/397b397/3246804901/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh-keep-fighting?refcode=em092816_2&amount=25.00&recurring=12&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=em102716&source=em102716") Friend,

Here at Van Hollen HQ, we've been counting down the days until Marylanders could head to the polls. That's why today -- the first day of early voting -- our team wanted to send you a quick reminder of some of the reasons to consider voting early.

**Here are our top 4 reasons to vote early:**

1\. You're one step closer to electing a proven, effective, progressive leader to the U.S. Senate.

2.With Early Voting Centers in every county in Maryland, voting early means you will likely spend less time waiting in line, so you'll be able to make it in and out of your polling place quickly.

3\. You'll have one less thing on your to-do list for Tuesday, November 8 in case other pressing things come up at the last minute.

4\. And finally, if you vote early you can volunteer with Team Van Hollen on Election Day!

There's no reason to wait. Early voting in Maryland runs from today through next Thursday. [**Please click here to confirm where you 'll vote, and then make a plan to head to the polls.**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91a9b/70cdc2ba/47363569/397b394/3246804901/VEsE/ "http://www.elections.state.md.us/voting/early_voting.html?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2+-+Please+click+here+to+confirm+where+yours&utm_campaign=em102716&source=em102716")

Let's get out and make change happen!

Team Van Hollen
[ Chip in Now](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91a9b/70cdc2ba/47363569/397b395/3246804901/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh-keep-fighting?refcode= em102716&amount=25.00&recurring=12&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=3+-+FIRSTNAME+Chip+in+Now&utm_campaign=em102716&source=em102716")
---

Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate

name: OurRevolution.com
subject: Outsized impact
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
body:
#
Sisters and Brothers,
The power of our political revolution has a secret: it is very important for us to get involved in races for Congress because of the broad impact on our country, but it's just as important to organize and support candidates at all levels of office.
That's because contributions to races for state legislatures have an incredibly outsized impact in those elections. Often these local elections are fought with a fraction of the money required to win a race for the House of Representatives.
**You can have incredible influence to help candidates endorsed by Our Revolution win their elections with contributions of even a few dollars.** The more people we can help win state offices, the bigger our progressive bench grows. The more progressives we elect, the more we can advance progressive policies in states across the country. And that is how we will change the future of our country.
**Seven candidates for state office need your help in these final days of the election.[Can you make a $3 contribution to Victoria Leigh, Mark Mackenize, Elizabeth Thomson, Larry Scherer, Devon Reese, Lorenzo Arredondo, and Andru Volinsky?](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/local-power?refcode=em161027-b "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/local-power?refcode=em161027-b")**
**Victoria Leigh** is running for state legislature in Arkansas because she believes that everyone has a right to a level playing field in life, regardless of the consequences of their birth. She knows that education is the great equalizer for children to get ahead, which is why she supports universal pre-K. Victoria will also fight for increased funding to make sure that seniors have access to affordable food and housing.
**Mark Mackenzie** is a former firefighter who is running to be a state representative in New Hampshire. Mark has spent decades fighting for better wages and working conditions for working people. He wants to change the rules in our economy so he can fight for policies that help to advance economic stability for families.
**Elizabeth Thomson's** career has been focused on helping kids, from her work as a pediatric physical therapist to her advocacy for children with autism. She's running for state legislature in New Mexico, where she has already been lauded by Mothers Against Drunk Driving for her work to reduce impaired driving in her state. She's running on a platform of stopping legislators from becoming lobbyists for two years, and she's advocating for increased transparency in government.
**Larry Scherer** wants to expand Medicare in Nebraska as a member of the state legislature so that everyone can have access to health insurance. He'll fight for good-paying jobs throughout the state and will make sure every child in the state has access to pre-kindergarten.
**Devon Reese** spent his career as an attorney advocating for nurses, teachers, and working people, and he's running for state senate in Nevada to continue to fight for public education and a fair economy. He's the son of a postal worker and nurse who understands the importance of good jobs for families.
**Lorenzo Arredondo** is running for Attorney General in the state of Indiana. Lorenzo's platform is focused on protecting working people from drug manufacturers, going after corporations that try to defraud customers, and making sure companies pay taxes. He knows that the way working families get ahead is by having a strong legal advocate for their interests, so people are protected instead of profits.
**Andru Volinsky** is making it a priority if he's elected to New Hampshire's executive council to restore funding for Planned Parenthood in the state. He knows the value of quality health care and properly funded education programs. Andru is currently leading the legal fight for one school district's fight for more equitable funding, and wants to continue that work in elected office.
[**The more candidates we can help win down ballot in November, the more progressive power we can use to advance progressive policies across the country. That's why your $3 contribution to these candidates today is so important.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/local-power?refcode=em161027-b "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/local-power?refcode=em161027-b")
In solidarity,
Shannon Jackson
Executive Director
Our Revolution
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/local-power?refcode=em161027-b "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/local-power?refcode=em161027-b")**

PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
603 2ND ST, NE
WASHINGTON, DC, 20002

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a 501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. All donations are made to support Our Revolution's general mission and are not designated for any specific activity.
603 2nd St NE, Washington, DC 20002
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123 "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/").

You can have incredible influence to help candidates endorsed by Our Revolution win their elections with contributions of even a few dollars. The more people we can help win state offices, the bigger our progressive bench grows. The more progressives we elect, the more we can advance progressive policies in states across the country. And that is how we will change the future of our country. Seven candidates for state office need your help in these final days of the election. "" Victoria Leigh is running for state legislature in Arkansas because she believes that everyone has a right to a level playing field in life, regardless of the consequences of their birth. She knows that education is the great equalizer for children to get ahead, which is why she supports universal pre-K. Victoria will also fight for increased funding to make sure that seniors have access to affordable food and housing. Mark Mackenzie is a former firefighter who is running to be a state representative in New Hampshire. Mark has spent decades fighting for better wages and working conditions for working people. He wants to change the rules in our economy so he can fight for policies that help to advance economic stability for families. Elizabeth Thomson's career has been focused on helping kids, from her work as a pediatric physical therapist to her advocacy for children with autism. She's running for state legislature in New Mexico, where she has already been lauded by Mothers Against Drunk Driving for her work to reduce impaired driving in her state. She's running on a platform of stopping legislators from becoming lobbyists for two years, and she's advocating for increased transparency in government. Larry Scherer wants to expand Medicare in Nebraska as a member of the state legislature so that everyone can have access to health insurance. He'll fight for good-paying jobs throughout the state and will make sure every child in the state has access to pre-kindergarten. Devon Reese spent his career as an attorney advocating for nurses, teachers, and working people, and he's running for state senate in Nevada to continue to fight for public education and a fair economy. He's the son of a postal worker and nurse who understands the importance of good jobs for families. Lorenzo Arredondo is running for Attorney General in the state of Indiana. Lorenzo's platform is focused on protecting working people from drug manufacturers, going after corporations that try to defraud customers, and making sure companies pay taxes. He knows that the way working families get ahead is by having a strong legal advocate for their interests, so people are protected instead of profits. Andru Volinsky is making it a priority if he's elected to New Hampshire's executive council to restore funding for Planned Parenthood in the state. He knows the value of quality health care and properly funded education programs. Andru is currently leading the legal fight for one school district's fight for more equitable funding, and wants to continue that work in elected office. "" In solidarity, Shannon Jackson Executive Director Our Revolution "" PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION 603 2ND ST, NE WASHINGTON, DC, 20002 Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a 501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. All donations are made to support Our Revolution's general mission and are not designated for any specific activity. 603 2nd St NE, Washington, DC 20002

---
Team -- _The New York Times_ just reported that Pennsylvania is critical in determining control of the Senate.

We can't afford to get this wrong -- control of the Senate AND the next Supreme Court justice hang in the balance. Remember when Mitch McConnell himself said, _" I may or may not be calling the shots next year"_?

[**We need you, and we need you NOW. Will you pitch in $5 before our FINAL end-of-month deadline so we can hit our goal?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/5780878242130952192/2829975804128002048?refcode=e20161027.4&refcode2=e20161027.4nd&amount=25)
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/5780878242130952192/2829975804128002048?refcode=e20161027.4&refcode2=e20161027.4nd&amount=25)
---

**We CAN 'T assume that this race is in the bag.** If there's anything we've learned, it's that the other side always has more money to throw at reelecting their Tea Party poster boy Pat Toomey -- and it's going to be _extremely tight every day_ until the very end.

**Let 's make sure we leave everything on the field and have no regrets come November 9th.**

[**Will you pitch in $5 to help us hit our goal before Monday at midnight?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/5780878242130952192/2829975804128002048?refcode=e20161027.4&refcode2=e20161027.4nd&amount=25) The race is _so_ close and the end is _so_ near -- but we have to fight all the way there.

[**www.katiemcginty.com/donate**](https://act.myngp.com/el/5780878242130952192/2829975804128002048?refcode=e20161027.4&refcode2=e20161027.4nd&amount=25)

-- McGinty HQ

| *** A note on donations ***

There are only 12 days left in this race, and the polls are in a virtual tie. Katie is fighting for working families in PA -- but we're up against major special interest spending. Can you make a grassroots donation today to help Katie win this race and take back the Senate?
**Chip in $5 today. Thank you.**

**[Donate Now](https://act.myngp.com/el/5780878242130952192/2829975804128002048?refcode=e20161027.4&refcode2=e20161027.4nd&amount=25)**
---

name: HillaryClinton.com
subject: No cherry picking
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 2
body:
We can't celebrate yet. | | Derek --

I know we’re all ready to celebrate making some history, but we're just not there yet.

Just look at the polls: In the past two days, we've seen surveys that have Trump ahead in Florida, Ohio, and North Carolina.

I don't want you to think that I'm just cherry picking bad news -- there are plenty of good results in the public polls, too.

But I'm sharing this information because they're warning signs that we should heed. I'm completely fine with everyone feeling good about what we've built together -- but no one should feel overconfident or think our work here is done.

With only 12 days left, we need to fight even harder now than we ever have before to ensure we don’t let this historic opportunity slip through our fingertips.

**If you’re with me, chip in to the Get Out the Vote Fund and make sure our incredible organizing operation can get the job done.** | **You’re one of our most committed supporters. If you've saved your payment information, your donation will go through immediately:
** | **[**Derek, donate now: $1**](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjY5MDkzMDAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTA0ODkwMDMxS0&mt=1&rt=0) **
---
**[**Derek, donate now: $5**](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=MjY5MDkzMDAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTA0ODkwMDMxS0&mt=1&rt=0)**
**[**Derek, donate now: $10**](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=MjY5MDkzMDAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTA0ODkwMDMxS0&mt=1&rt=0)**
**[**Derek, donate now: $25**](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MjY5MDkzMDAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTA0ODkwMDMxS0&mt=1&rt=0)**
**[**Derek, donate now: $50**](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=18&ms=MjY5MDkzMDAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTA0ODkwMDMxS0&mt=1&rt=0)**
**
Thanks,

Robby

Robby Mook
Campaign Manager
Hillary for America

This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just [click here](https://www.hillaryclinton.com/forms/contact-us/) to send us a message! If you'd like more information on key policies, visit [hillaryclinton.com/issues](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjY5MDkzMDAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTA0ODkwMDMxS0&mt=1&rt=0). Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=16&ms=MjY5MDkzMDAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTA0ODkwMDMxS0&mt=1&rt=0) to receive less email and click [here](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=MjY5MDkzMDAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTA0ODkwMDMxS0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. name: Chuck Flannery, Friends of Cole
subject: Please
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF COLE
body:
| | Friend --
Bill has emailed you. Ann Worely has emailed you. Gov. John Kasich has emailed you. Now I’m emailing you again to kindly ask you to make an immediate contribution to help fund our voter turnout operation in the final days of the campaign. We are only 42 donors short of our goal by tomorrow at midnight. Friend, **[can you make a generous donation to Bill Cole right now?](https://billcole.nationbuilder.com/bill_cole_donate?e=6827555c47a2f041f636b0c6a0edbd27&utm_source=billcole&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1027_2&n=1 "Donate Today")** **[Donate below](https://billcole.nationbuilder.com/bill_cole_donate?e=6827555c47a2f041f636b0c6a0edbd27&utm_source=billcole&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1027_2&n=2 "Donate Today")** and help Bill become the next governor of West Virginia! **[

clean_body: "" "" I'll be blunt: We can only take back the Democratic Senate if we win here in New Hampshire. But a recent poll shows that if the election were held today, Governor Hassan would LOSE. The Washington Post confirms our race is one of only FIVE that will decide Senate control (not to mention the balance of the Supreme Court) -- but, team, our records show that you haven't stepped up yet to help secure this rare match and potentially DOUBLE our resources to take back a Democratic Senate : EMAIL: dpwillis67@gmail.com MATCH STATUS: Pending SUGGESTED ACTION: "" "" National Republicans tied to Mitch McConnell, Karl Rove, and the Koch Brothers have spent $50 MILLION to make sure that Maggie doesn't win and keep their obstructionist Senate. And with just 12 days until the election, the ONLY way we'll pull ahead in the polls is if we hit our $21,550 goal and secure this extraordinary match. We HAVE to unlock this rare match before it's too late: "" If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: "" "" "" "" Thanks for standing with Maggie, Marc Goldberg ""

| Greetings,
---
| According to a recent article in Seven Days, my opponent and her allies are outspending us in these crucial final weeks before the election. "Adding up all the outside spending, pro-Minter super PACs have actually outspent pro-Scott groups in the past two weeks. Those backing the Democrat have spent $637,000 in that period, while those supporting the Republican have spent $593,000." We need your help! Outside interests are attacking me and my record. We need your support to fight back. [Please consider donating $100, $250, $500, $1000 or whatever you can afford today!](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=1114567f7d&e=19cebfe173) We're in a good position to win on Election Day but cannot back down and we have to respond. Thank you for your help! Phil
